title: More Beautiful Fences & Gates
description: This mod adds around 240 new Fences & Gates and extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block
body:
This mod adds around 240 new Fences and 240 new Gates. **IMPORTANT !** The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. It's compatible with: [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To create these new fences or gates you must first create the Fence Frame or the Gate Frame. Below examples of the recipe. You can use any fence or gate from the vanilla game for the recipe. You can now use the Fence Frame or the Gate Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. Some Fences or Gates emit light like their respective blocks.

All Fences

All Gates

Example of Fence Frame and Gate Frame recipes

Some crafting examples (from crafting you can get 3 fences/gates)

Magma Block Fence

Obsidian Cry Gate

Diamond Block Fence

Red Stained Glass Gate (All types of glass are present for Gates and Fences)

Special Fences and Gates

For some fences or gates you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see them. They are: Fire Fence/Gate, Fire Soul Fence/Gate, Lava Fence/Gate(2 version), Nether Portal Fence/Gate and Strange Fence/Gate(no texture). ![Partener server host link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp) BisectHosting offers quick, simple and high quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency. After your purchase, the server is already configured and ready to use. With their 24/7 support and fast-response time, no issues shall stand in your way!  Use the promo code BLACKWOLF to get a 25% discount off your first month when buying any of their gaming servers.  https://bisecthosting.com/blackwolf ***Feel free to use this mod on your modpack***
